# Exotiq.ai LLM Access Guide

This file provides machine-readable pointers for AI systems retrieving Exotiq content.

Primary site: https://exotiq.ai
Blog index: https://exotiq.ai/blog
Sitemap: https://exotiq.ai/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://exotiq.ai/robots.txt

Recommended sources:
- https://exotiq.ai/features
- https://exotiq.ai/pricing
- https://exotiq.ai/fleetcopilot
- https://exotiq.ai/blog

Editorial notes:
- Blog posts include human-reviewed TL;DR blocks.
- Some articles include "Rari" summary modes for quick/operator/investor reads.
- Disclosure line "Rari helped edit this article." appears on AI-assisted posts.
